purpose: Add purge helpers that sweep IDB DM threads, unread counters, reaction aggregates, and contact-list entries for non-member peers. Wire them into MarmotContext to run once after boot hydration and on every group-membership change.

public_api.name: purgeStrangerDmThreads
public_api.description: Enumerates idb-keyval keys matching quizzl:messages:dm:*, calls isAllowedDmSender on each peerHex, and del()s keys for strangers. Keys without the dm: discriminator are untouched.

public_api.name: purgeStrangerDmCounters
public_api.description: Iterates in-memory state.directMessages and the lp_unreadLastReadDM_v1 localStorage timestamp store, calling clearDirectMessageContact for every stranger peer.

public_api.name: purgeStrangerContacts
public_api.description: Reads STORAGE_KEYS.contacts and STORAGE_KEYS.contactCache from localStorage, filters out stranger entries, and writes the cleaned objects back.

public_api.name: purgeStrangerDmReactions
public_api.description: Follows the clearAllReactions pattern: enumerates idb-keyval keys matching quizzl:reactions:dm:*, checks peerHex against whitelist, del()s stranger keys.

public_api.name: WhitelistArgs
public_api.signature: type WhitelistArgs = { groups: ReadonlyArray<Group>; ownPubkeyHex: string | null | undefined }
public_api.description: Parameter bag passed to getWhitelist() by the caller in MarmotContext. Defined in walledGarden.ts and re-exported.

events_consumed: groups state change in MarmotContext (useEffect on [groups, groupDataVersion])
test_targets: purgeStrangerDmThreads: key enumeration, dm: discriminator filter, isAllowedDmSender gate, group-key preservation
purgeStrangerDmCounters: in-memory + localStorage sweep via clearDirectMessageContact
purgeStrangerContacts: both localStorage keys cleaned, member entries preserved
purgeStrangerDmReactions: reactions:dm: key sweep, reactions:group: keys untouched
MarmotContext wiring: purge runs once post-hydration, re-runs on groups change
